description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, results, and release. Use an alpine:3.14 job named alpine that runs the CUnit build script: mkdir build-${CI_JOB_NAME}, cd build-${CI_JOB_NAME}, cmake .., cmake --build . -j2, ctest --output-on-failure, ./Examples/CI/cicd-pass-plain, ./Examples/CI/cicd-pass-setupfuncs, python3 -m junit2htmlreport --summary-matrix Examples/CI/*-Results.xml, cpack -G TGZ CUnit, and publish the generated CUnitCI.h, build-*/cunit-*.tar.gz, build-*/cunit-*.deb, and XML test results as JUnit artifacts. Add two alpine‑based test jobs: alpine-dirbuild runs cd CMakeExamples/CMakeSubmodule, ln -s ../../. cunit-x.y.z, mkdir bld, cd bld, cmake .., cmake --build ., ./test-program; alpine-pkgbuild runs find . -type f -name "*.tar.gz", mkdir -p packages/cunit, tar -vxf build-alpine/cunit-3.*.tar.gz --strip-components=1 -C packages/cunit, then builds the CMakeFindPackage example with cmake .. -DCUnit_DIR=$(pwd)/../../../packages/cunit/CUnit/share/cmake, cmake --build ., ./test-program. Provide Ubuntu 20.04 build jobs: ubuntu2004 runs the full CUnit build script (same as alpine) after apt‑get installing cmake, build‑essential, make, python3‑pip and pip installing junit2html; ubuntu2004-notests runs a variant that disables tests and examples with cmake .. -DCUNIT_DISABLE_TESTS=TRUE -DCUNIT_DISABLE_EXAMPLES=TRUE, then builds and lists files. Include a macOS job named apple that executes the same CUnit build script on a macOS runner, and a Windows job named windows (tag saas-windows-medium-amd64) that runs mkdir build-windows, cd build-windows, cmake .., cmake --build ., ctest -C Debug. Finally, add a release job named pages using alpine:3.14 that installs doxygen, runs doxygen Doxyfile, moves doc/html/ to public/, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
